title: Magical Midnight Filipino Strawberry Crumble
description: A garlicky, dense, and sweet Filipino dish featuring strawberries, perfect for midnight cravings. This gluten-free friendly dessert is made with dehydrated strawberries and cooked in a cazuela.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, mix together the rehydrated strawberries, garlic, and coconut sugar.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the almond flour, coconut oil, eggs, vanilla extract, and salt.
Add the dry ingredients to the strawberry mixture and stir until well combined.
Pour the mixture into a cazuela and bake for 35 minutes.
Remove the crumble from the oven and let it cool for 10 minutes.
Serve the crumble warm, garnished with additional dehydrated strawberries if desired.
Store any leftovers in an airtight container in the refrigerator for up to 3 days.
